title: add a monday doc as a widget in dashboard without link

posts.author: mmorales (Michael Morales)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the only way to add a Monday doc to a dashboard as a widget is through Embed Everything, but to do that I must share the link as public from the Monday doc.

That is nonsense. How is it possible that I can’t add a Monday doc as a widget inside monday itself, which sould be available only to monday members, directly without the need of a shareable public link?

That’s the feature that I need: the possibility to add monday docs as widgets in a dashboard.
